arts.ttl: AC Milan and Roma aiming for the semi-finals
arts.sum: After Juventus (36) and Inter (29), Milan (24) and Roma (22) are the two teams to have reached the semi-finals of the Coppa Italia the most times in the history of the competition – however, the Giallorossi have not progressed past the quarterfinals since the 2016/17 season (2-1 against Cesena). After two consecutive eliminations against Roma in the quarterfinals of the Coppa Italia (in 1980 and 1984), Milan progressed in the most recent clash with the Giallorossi at this stage of the tournament, when they won both the first leg and the second leg 2-1 during the 2003/04 edition.

arts.ttl: Ibrahimovic’s Vision Shapes Camarda’s Future at Milan
arts.sum: In an unexpected turn of events, AC Milan's young prodigy Francesco Camarda will remain with the Rossoneri, despite a nearly finalized loan deal with Monza. This decision, influenced heavily by Zlatan Ibrahimovic, now a key figure in Milan's management, marks a significant shift in the club's approach to nurturing young talent. arts.ttl: Coppa Italia | Milan v Roma: Match Preview
arts.sum: In a highly anticipated Coppa Italia quarter-final clash, AC Milan will host Roma at the iconic San Siro on Wednesday evening. Both teams, currently struggling in Serie A, view this cup tie as a golden opportunity to salvage their seasons and keep their hopes of domestic silverware alive.
